keywordspec.name: lge.auto.AudioLibrary
keywordspec.doc: The `AudioLibrary` Class can check if there is muted or not.

kw.name: IsMute
kw.doc:
Use case : Music, Radio Don't use : Single Tone, White Noise
If max(Signal Amplitude)/min(Noise Amplitude) ratio is under 25dB, it is muted and return value is "TRUE".
"dB scale" vs "scalar scale" 30db: 31.6, 25dB: 17.8, 21dB: 11.2, 19dB: 8.9, 17dB: 7.1, 15dB : 5.6 , 13dB: 4.5, 11dB: 3.5, 9dB: 2.8, 7dB: 2.2, 5dB: 1.8
Examples: | `IsMute` |
kw.shortdoc: Use case : Music, Radio Don't use : Single Tone, White Noise

kw.name: Select Channels
kw.doc:
Select Channels
argument: - ``audio_device_s`` : String, A part of Audio Device Name ex)USB PnP pulse ...
Examples: | `Select Channels` | audio_device_s="USB" |

kw.name: Start Recording
kw.doc:
Start Recording
argument: - ``record_seconds`` : Recording Duration [sec] ex) 0.5 is 500 ms
Examples: | `Start Recording` | record_seconds=0.5 |
